metrics.name: academorix.refund.count
metrics.description: Count of refunds per (status, reason, refund_type). Sampled hourly.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.pending_approvals
metrics.description: Count of refunds stuck in awaiting_approval. Sampled every 15 minutes. Feeds the SLA-approaching alert threshold.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.approvals_pending_total
metrics.description: Every awaiting_approval transition. trigger IN ('amount_threshold', 'staleness_threshold', 'both', 'always_approve_reason').

metrics.name: academorix.refund.approvals_stale_total
metrics.description: Refunds stuck in awaiting_approval > refund.approval.approval_sla_hours. P2 signal — SLA-approaching alert.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.approvals_completed_total
metrics.description: outcome IN ('approved', 'rejected'). auto_approved boolean.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.approval_duration_hours
metrics.description: Hours from awaiting_approval -> approved/rejected. Powers approval-SLA monitoring.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.provider_dispatch_total
metrics.description: outcome IN ('sync_success', 'async_processing', 'failed', 'provider_error').

metrics.name: academorix.refund.provider_dispatch_duration_ms
metrics.description: InitiateProviderRefundJob HTTP call duration. P99 target < 5000ms.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.polls_total
metrics.description: CheckRefundProviderStatusJob invocations. terminal_state = still_processing / succeeded / failed / provider_error / provider_reference_not_found.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.failed_total
metrics.description: failure_reason_category IN ('already_refunded', 'source_invalid', 'insufficient_funds', 'provider_account_closed', 'authentication_failed', 'other').

metrics.name: academorix.refund.provider_errors_total
metrics.description: error_category IN ('network_timeout', 'rate_limit', 'transient_5xx', 'authentication', 'unknown'). P1 signal when this counter surges.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.provider_errors_stale_total
metrics.description: Refunds stuck in provider_error > 24h. P2 signal — actionable to ops.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.processed_to_success_duration_hours
metrics.description: Hours from processing -> succeeded. Card refunds typically 120-240h. P99 target < 240h (10 days).

metrics.name: academorix.refund.request_to_success_duration_hours
metrics.description: End-to-end request -> success duration. Consumer-protection-law SLA monitoring.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.finalizations_total
metrics.description: success=true when FinalizeRefundJob completed all 5 steps; false when the chain partial-failed + refund transitioned to provider_error.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.finalization_failures_total
metrics.description: P1 signal. failure_step IN ('transaction_recorder', 'credit_note_issuer', 'invoice_state_updater', 'clawback_coordinator', 'marketing_fire').

metrics.name: academorix.refund.atomicity.failures_total
metrics.description: CRITICAL. Refund transaction atomicity failures. Should stay at 0. failure_point: 'status_update' / 'finalization_partial' / 'unknown'.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.orphaned_provider_refunds_total
metrics.description: P2 signal. Provider-side refunds detected without a matching local row. Requires investigation.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.orphaned_local_succeeded_total
metrics.description: Refunds in status='succeeded' with credit_note_id IS NULL OR transaction_id IS NULL. Actionable via refund:generate-credit-note admin CLI.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.clawback_referral_total
metrics.description: RefundClawbackReferral cascades fired.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.clawback_coupon_total
metrics.description: RefundClawbackCoupon cascades fired.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.reconciliations_total
metrics.description: ReconcileRefundsJob per-refund reconciliations. drift_detected=true means the local status differed from provider.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.reconciliation_run_duration_ms
metrics.description: ReconcileRefundsJob total run duration. P99 target < 600000ms (10 min).

metrics.name: academorix.refund.approvals_notified_total
metrics.description: NotifyRefundApprovalRequiredJob per-refund approver-notification dispatches.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.notifications_dispatched_total
metrics.description: channel IN ('mail', 'in_app', 'sms', 'push'). status IN ('requested', 'approval_required', 'approved', 'processed', 'succeeded', 'failed', 'rejected', 'cancelled').

metrics.name: academorix.refund.entitlement.gate_refusals_total
metrics.description: Route hits refused by the entitlement middleware. Product signal for upgrade-CTA impressions.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.retention.purged_total
metrics.description: PurgeExpiredRefundDataJob emits. entity: 'refunds' / 'refund_lines'. destination: 'hard_delete' / 'compliance_archive'.

metrics.name: academorix.refund.marketing_events_dispatched_total
metrics.description: How many marketing negative-value conversion events fire per ad-network provider. provider IN ('meta_capi', 'google_ads_ec', 'tiktok_events_api', 'microsoft_uet', 'snapchat_capi').
